comment: Quality Gates catalog — orphan-scripts waivers. Each row documents a script that genuinely cannot be absorbed into a quality/gates/<dim>/ home and explains why. SIMPLIFY-12 (P63) audits this file at milestone close. Ideally empty.

asserts: covered by scripts/end-state.py during the parallel-migration window; will be migrated to quality/gates/release/ in P58

rows.owner_hint: P58 Wave A: catalog rows release/crates-io-max-version/<crate> for 9 crates anchored in quality/catalogs/release-assets.json. Wave B ships quality/gates/release/crates-io-max-version.py (the verifier). Wave E flips this waiver to resolved + removes this orphan-scripts row. The 9 crates-io max-version checks now live in release-assets.json and supersede this temporary documentation.

waiver.reason: W-2 plan-check fix: parallel-migration parity is documentary, not behavioral; the crates.io max-version check is currently in scripts/end-state.py and will move to release-dim in P58 (SIMPLIFY-04/05). Documents the temporary coverage gap so the verifier subagent knows the regression class is still gated.
